entry.title: 【老旧车】奔驰 260E-V124\Benz 260E-V124
entry.content:
奔驰 260E-V124
1953年奔驰推出的其第一款三厢车-180（代号W120），在之后的日子奔驰相继发售了W110、W114\W115、W123等多款车型，但“E-class”这个名字却是从1993年6月中期改款之后才正式被官方作为行政级（Executive）轿车的名字使用。

1984年9月，奔驰在法兰克福车展上正式发布了W124四门轿车版本，其车身尺寸长宽高为4740mm×1740mm×1428mm，轴距为2800mm。在之后的7年里奔驰相继发布了旅行版-S124、双门Coupe版本-C124、六门8座加长版-V124（该版本相比普通版增加了增加了800mm的轴距）、敞篷版-A124；截止到1997年敞篷版停产，第一代奔驰E级的累计销量为2562143辆；
拍摄于2014年8月！

+++
Benz 260E-V124
In 1953, Mercedes-Benz launched its first sedan -180 (W120), and in the following days Mercedes-Benz sold W110、W114\W115、W123 , but the "E-class" was officially fitted with the “Executive series cars” since June 1993 after the mid-term change.

In September 1984, Mercedes-Benz officially released the W124 four-door sedan at the Frankfurt Motor Show, with a body size of 4740mm×1740mm×1428mm, and wheelbase of 2800mm. Over the next seven years, Mercedes-Benz released Wagon-S124、Coupe-C124、Six doors\Eight seats -V124 (this version add 800mm wheelbase compared with the seden), and Convertible-A124 one by one. By the discounnect of the convertible version in 1997, the cumulative sales of the first generation of Mercedes-Benz E-Class was 2,562,143 units;
Shooting in August 2014!

===
右前\Right front

右后\Right Rear

entry.title: 【老旧车】马自达 RX-8\Mazda RX-8
entry.content:
马自达 RX-8
RX-8是马自达最后一款搭载转子发动机的车型（不考虑 Demio EV），也是全球所有汽车品牌中最后一款使用转子发动机量产车型。

2005年上海车展期间，马自达公司宣布，将向中国市场投放的4种新车型，分别是：RX-8、Mazda6掀背式轿车、Mazda6旅行车以及Tribute（与福特翼虎escape、水星水手mariner同平台）。同年，马自达正式向中国出口6mt版本的RX-8，售价为38.5万元。

2008年改款之后（最大特征就是变成了4圆尾灯）国内则引进了6mt-售价38万和 6at-售价39万。
拍摄于2024年1月！

===
Mazda RX-8
RX-8 is the last Mazda model to used rotary engine (not includ Demio EV), and the last production model of any car brand in the world to use a rotary engine.

During the 2005 Shanghai International Automobile Industry Exhitition, Mazda announced that they will bring four models into China-market: the RX-8、the Mazda6 fastback、the Mazda6 wagon, and the Tribute (use the same platform as the Ford escape and Mercury mariner). In the same year, Mazda officially exported RX-8 6mt to China at a price of 385,000 Yuan.

After the 2008 revision (the biggest change is use 4 round rear lights), Mazda introduction 6mt(380,000 Yuan) and 6at(390,000 Yuan) into China.
Shooting in January 2024!

+++
左前\Left front

右后\Right rear

entry.title: 【老旧车】格力 脸谱 厢式货车\Gree Facial Makeup Cargo van
entry.content:
Gree Facial Makeup cargo van

Cargo Capacity 7m³

Range up to 200km

Website:https://www.greelto.com/sohw-13516.html/

+++
左前\Left front

entry.title: 【老旧车】众泰 Z100\Zotye Z100
entry.content:
众泰z100
1992年底，按照“兵总”的统一部署，第二代铃木奥拓改款（代号CA72）在国内由4个生产企业同时生产，他们分别是：重庆长安、吉林江北（吉利）、湘潭江南（众泰）、西安秦川（比亚迪）。1995年3月，第一辆国产的奥拓下线， 13年后的2008年7月，长安铃木宣布第2代奥拓正式停产。在2009年的上海车展上第七代奥拓HA25正式在中国亮相，2016年第七代奥拓停产。

在CA72停产之后众泰立刻利用其收购江南汽车所获的资料生产了-江南奥拓“经典”版。2年之后的2010年，众泰更是基于CA72推出了仅售1.88万元的江南tt。可是CA72毕竟是一款13岁的老车了，其市场表现并不好。于是，众泰将目光瞄上了现款的奥拓HA25。在2013年长安奥拓改款之后，众泰便推出了和老款车型长得“一模一样的”而价格却比现款车型足足便宜一万块的-Z100。值得一提的是，这是以山寨闻名的众泰出的第一款真正山寨车。
拍摄于2023年3月！

btw：众泰分别于2015年和2016年推出了TT的纯电动版-江南T11和z100的纯电动版云100s

===
Zotye Z100
At the end of 1992, according to the deployment of the "norinco group", the second-generation Suzuki alto (CA72) was produced at the same time by four production enterprises in China, they are: Chongqing Changan, Jilin Jiangbei (Geely), Xiangtan Jiangnan (Zotye), Xi 'an Qinchuan (BYD). Changan-Suzuki made the second generation (CA72) Suzuki Alto from 1988 until 2008. At the Shanghai International Automobile Industry Exhibition in 2009, the seven generation Alto HA25 was officially launched in China, and the it was discontinued in 2016.

After CA72 discontinued, Zotye used the data which from its acquisition of Jiangnan Automobile to produce the Jiangnan Alto "Classic" version immediately . Two years later, in 2010, Zotye launched the Jiangnan TT which based on the CA72 and only 18,800 Yuan. However, CA72 is so old that market is not good. So Zotye set its sights on the Alto HA25. After appearance changed of Changan Alto in 2013, Zotye launched the Z100, which is "exactly the same" as the old appearance and the price is ten thousand yuan cheaper than the current Changan Alto. It is worth mentioning that this is the first real knockoff car came of Zotye, which is famous for knockoff.
Shooting in March 2023！

btw: Zotye launched electric versions of the TT-Jiangnan T11 in 2015 and electric Z100-Yun 100s in 2016

+++
众泰 Z100的广告片\Advertising of Zotye Z100
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1q24y1Z7D1/?share_source=copy_web/

右前\Right front

右后\Right rear

entry.title: 【老旧车】别克 荣誉\Buick Royaum
entry.content:
上海通用汽车有限公司在1997年成立，1998年12月，第一辆国产别克新世纪轿车下线。替代别克新世纪的车型别克君威于2002年12月问世。随着中国加入wto，中国国内的家用汽车销量稳步上涨，到2003年凭借四百六十万辆的销量成为仅次于美国和日本的全球第三大汽车市场。而早年间进入市场的奥迪凭借a6这一先发优势大杀特杀，在此背景下众多品牌争先恐后的开办合资工厂，力求分得一杯羹。

而上海通用为了实现“更上一步”的目标，在2004年底发布了别克荣御（Royaum），该车面世之初被定义为行政级座驾，该车在国内有2.8升和3.6升两种排量共四款车型，官方零售价格为36.8万元至49.8万元。这款车型实际是澳大利亚霍顿第二代Caprice（WL）的换标车，早期以CKd的形式在上海通用工厂组装，由于荣御的销量十分惨淡从2006年4月开始停止了ckd生产并且改为原装车进口，贴上海通用品牌对外销售（根据中国规定，因为国产化率太低所以通过KD方式国产依然按照整车标准征税，因此两者在售价上相差无几）。
拍摄于2023年12月！

===
Buick Royaum
Shanghai GM was established in 1997, and in December 1998, the first domestic-Buick New Century sedan rolled off the production line. The replacement-Buick Regal, was introduced in December 2002. With China jointo the WTO, domestic family car sales rose steadily, and China became the world’s third largest car market at 4.6 million units in 2003, behind only the United States and Japan. By the advantage of the faster-mover, Audi got a "nice" sold rate with A6, and under this background, many brands are scrambling to set up joint venture factories and strive to get a piece in China market.

In order to achieve the goal of "going hihger", Shanghai GM released the Buick Royaum at the end of 2004, which was defined as an "executive class" , the car has four models in China with 2.8L and 3.6L engine and the price from 368,000 Yuan to 498,000 Yuan. This model is actually the second generation Holden Caprice (WL) , which was assembled in the form of CKD at the Shanghai GM factory in the early stage. But ,due to the poor sales rate, CKD production was stopped in April 2006, and began imported original Holden which sold under the brand of Shanghai GM ( Because the localization component rate is too low, according to Chinese regulations, the tax between import and CKD isn't so big difference, so the two are almost the same in price.)
Shooting in December 2023！

+++
别克 荣誉的广告片\Advertising of Buick Royaum
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1jb4y1h72v/?share_source=copy_web/

左前\Left front

右后\Right rear

entry.title: 【老旧车 】本田 S2000\Honda S2000
entry.content:
Honda S2000
Shooting in June 2014!

entry.title: 【老旧车】奥迪 100s\Audi 100s
entry.content:
奥迪100s
1968年，奥迪发布了基于C1平台研发了第一代的奥迪100，其命名来源于初代奥迪100所搭载的最大功率为100马力的发动机。

1982年，基于C3平台的第三代奥迪100车型上市。

1985年3月，上海大众合资公司于正式成立，主要生产桑塔纳轿车。在上海大众成立的同一年（1985年），国家就有了引进奥迪100轿车的想法，并最终决定由长春一汽和上海大众同时试组装。在经过初期试装后，该项目最终落地长春一汽（此时恰逢一汽与克莱斯勒就引进克莱斯勒600的谈判破裂）。

1990年12月，第四代奥迪100（C4）问世。1992年12月，长春一汽开始以CKD模式生产这一代的“奥迪100-4”（C4-V6）。由于此时轿车走私活动非常严重，所以在大陆不时能看到一些德国原装的奥迪100
（C4）
拍摄于2013年10月！

===
Audi 100s
In 1968，Audi launched The first generation Audi 100 which was developed on the C1 platform，and the name 100 came from the 100hp engine of top version.

The Audi 100-C3 released in 1982

In March 1985, the “Shanghai Volkswagen Joint Venture Company” was formally established, and producing Santana（Passt B2）. In the same year , the govermant had the idea of import the Audi 100（C3） , and finally decided to tentative assembly by Changchun FAW and Shanghai Volkswagen same time. After the tentative assembly, this project finally “landing”at Changchun FAW (which coincided with the breakdown of negotiations between FAW and Chrysler on the introduction of the Chrysler 600).

In December 1990, the fourth generation Audi 100 (C4) was launched. In December 1992, the FAW began produced "Audi 100-4" (C4-V6) by CKD model. Due to the serious smuggling activities of cars at this time, some German original Audi 100 also can be seen the mainland
Shooting in October 2013!

+++
右前\Right front

尾部\Rear

entry.title: 【老旧车】昌河 爱迪尔第一代\Changhe Ideal I
entry.content:
昌河爱迪尔
昌河汽车原隶属于昌河飞机制造厂，在国家“军转民”的政策下，昌河于1973年开始踏足汽车制造领域，其第一款车是一款大客车。1982 年，昌河以日本铃木公司生产的ST-90V为参考对象生产出了国内第一款微型车-CH1010。1995年，昌河汽车与日本铃木汽车合资，建立昌河铃木公司。

自2001年中国加入世界贸易组织之后，人民群众对于家用轿车的需求也日益增加，而此时市场上销售的车型很难满足人们的需求（老三样太贵，夏利、奥拓又太老）。在这样的背景下，中国市场出现了第一次小型车浪潮，哈飞路宝、奇瑞QQ、SPARK、通田阁萝、一汽幸福使者这些廉价小车如雨后春笋般出现在了市场上，售价5.68万的昌河爱迪尔也是其中一员（QQ 1.1L舒适型售价4.98万元、路宝 1.1L售价为6.3万元\1.0L售价为5.78万元、SPARK官方指导价为6万元、通田阁萝售价为4.28万元、幸福使者售价为3.58万）。

第一代爱迪尔于2003年-2005年期间由昌河合肥工厂生产，使用哈尔滨东安提供的1.0升（国4）、1.1升（国3）两款发动机。2006年，昌河发布爱迪尔II型，II型车增加了东安1.3升和铃木k14b 1.4升两款发动机可供选择。
拍摄于2023年11月！

===
Changhe Ideal I
Changhe Automobile formerly belonged to Changhe Aircraft Factory, under the "military to civilian" policy, Changhe began to step into the area of automobile in 1973, its first car is a bus. In 1982, based on the SUZUKI ST-90V, Changha produced the first minicar-CH1010. In 1995, Changhe and Suzuki joint venture to establish Changhe-Suzuki Company.

Since China join to the WTO in 2001, people's demand for family cars has increased, but the models are difficult to match the people's desire (the old three-Santana\Passt b2、Jetta a2、Ctrion ZX are too expensive, Xiali and Alto are too old). In this context, the Chinese market appeared the first wave of small cheap cars, Hafei Lubao, Chery QQ, SPARK, Tongtian Geluo, FAW Happiness Messenger these cheap cars mushroomed in the market, Changhe Ideal which priced at 56,800 Yuan, also one of them (QQ 1.1L comfort priced at 49,800 Yuan, Lubao 1.1L priced at 63,000 Yuan\1.0L priced at 57,800 Yuan, SPARK priced 60,000 Yuan, Tongtian GeLuo priced at 42,800 Yuan, and Happiness Messenger priced at 35,800 Yuan).

The first generation of Ideal was produced by Changhe Hefei Factory from 2003 to 2005, using 1.0L(EU4) and 1.1L (EU3) engines supplied by Harbin Dongan Company. In 2006, Changhe released the Ideal II, addition Dongan 1.3L and Suzuki k14b 1.4L engines.
Shooting in November 2023!

+++
爱迪尔的广告片\Advertising of Ideal
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1fS4y187tp/

右前\Right front

右后\Right rear

entry.title: 【老旧车】迷你微卡-长安星卡\Mini truck-Changan star
entry.content:
长安星卡
2002年7月8日，河北长安汽车有限公司正式成立。同年，开始生产名称为“长安星卡”的微型货车。

2007年河北长安发布型号为SC1022S8的小型货车，该车的长/宽/高分别是3860mm/1485mm/1870mm、
座位数为2+3人、排量为0.8l（最大功率为29kw、最大马力为40匹）、额定载货质量380kg，在货车普遍求大的国内这绝对算得上一个异类！
拍摄于2022年4月！

btw：日本规定：车辆长/宽/高分别不超过3400mm/1480mm/2000mm、座位不超过4个 、额定载货质量不超过350kg、排量不超过660ml（最大功率不超过47kw、63hp）的车辆为K-Car。

===
Changan star
On July 8, 2002, Hebei Changan Automobile Co., Ltd. was formally established. In the same year, the production of mini truck which named "Changan Star" began.

In 2007, Hebei Changan released a mini truck which model SC1022S8, the length/width/height of the car are 3860mm/1485mm/1870mm、the person capacity is 2+3、the displacement is 0.8l (maximum power is 29kw、maximum horsepower is 40hp), and the rated cargo mass is 380kg, which is an anomaly in the country where seek for “more larger”!
Shooting in April 2022!

btw：Japan govermaent stipulates that the length/width/height of the vehicle does not exceed 3400mm/1480mm/2000mm, the seat does not exceed 4、thethe rated cargo mass does not exceed 350kg，and an engine capacity less than 660cc (maximum power does not exceed 47kw) is K-Car.

+++
右前\Right front

entry.title: 【老旧车】英菲尼迪 J30\Infiniti J30
entry.content:
英菲尼迪j30
J30是英菲尼迪J系列的第一款车型，它的开发工作起始于1988年夏季并于1992年正式上市以接替停产的M30。因为该车是为了美国市场特点而量身定做，所以其设计全部是由日产位于美国加里福尼的团队完成。自1992年推出以来，它经历了三代车型的演变，分别是J30、J30t和Q45。

在日本，尼桑把英菲尼迪J30改名为尼桑Leopard J.Ferie以填补二代Leopard停产之后留下的空档（J.Ferie这个来源于法语Jours fériés，意为“假日”）。值得一提的是，尼桑Leopard J.Ferie除了提供与J30相同的VG30DE-3.0LV6发动机以外，还提供了J30所没有的VH41DE-4.1L V8（该款发动机同时使用在美国市场上销售的CIMA\西玛上面）。
拍摄于2013年9月！

===
Infiniti J30
The J30 was the first model in Infiniti's J series, j30 development work beginning in the summer of 1988 and it was officially launched in 1992 to replace the discontinued M30. Because the car was designed for the American market, all it was designed at Nissan's California team. Since its launched in 1992, it has evolved three generations-J30, J30t and Q45.

In Japan, Nissan renamed the Infiniti J30 to Nissan Leopard J.Erie to fill the gap which because of the second generation Leopard disconnected ( J.Ferie derived from the French-Jours fériés, meaning “holiday”). Nissan Leopard J.Ferie not only offering the same VG30DE-3.0LV6 engine as the J30, but also equipped the VH41DE-4.1L V8 which J30 does not (this engine is also used in the CIMA thoes sold in the US market).
Shooting in September 2013!

+++
右前\Right front
